title: Permission prompt storm — 80+ approval prompts per Forge command without --dangerously-skip-permissions
description: Every Forge command triggers 80+ individual permission prompts because no allow rules are shipped with the plugin. Each node tool call, shell command, Write/Edit, and compound operation (pipes, &&, ||) requires separate approval. /forge:report-bug itself fails on first step due to 2>&1 | head compound rejection. ~900 distinct permission triggers exist across plugin source.
